title: Le puritain
writer: Liam O'Flaherty, Jeff Musso, Jeannine Delpech
actors: Pierre Fresnay, Jean-Louis Barrault, Viviane Romance
plot: A religious fanatic finds his entire life and philosophy turned upside-down as he falls in love with a girl and kills her in a jealous rage. His search is for peace of mind and a desire to justify the murder of the girl to himself...
